home.tagline: Know Your Rights. Count the Days. Understand the Law.

learn.title: Civic Education
learn.subtitle: Everything you need to know about elections in Nigeria — in plain language, backed by law.

settings.title: Settings
settings.aboutText: CivicNG is a non-partisan civic education tool designed to help Nigerians understand their electoral rights and obligations. All legal references are drawn from the Nigerian Constitution and the Electoral Act.
settings.disclaimerText: This app provides general civic information. For legal advice, consult a qualified lawyer. For official electoral information, visit INEC at inec.gov.ng.

law.constitution: Constitution of the Federal Republic of Nigeria, 1999

install.prompt: Add CivicNG to your home screen for offline access

home.tagline: San Haƙƙinku. Ƙidaya Kwanakin. Fahimci Doka.

learn.title: Ilimin Farar Hula
learn.subtitle: Duk abin da kuke buƙata game da zaɓen Najeriya — cikin harshe mai sauƙi, tare da goyan bayan doka.

settings.title: Saiti
settings.aboutText: CivicNG kayan aikin ilimin farar hula ne wanda ba ya son ɓangare ɗaya, wanda aka ƙera don taimaka wa Nijeriyawa su fahimci haƙƙoƙin zaɓe da wajibacinsu. Duk nassosi na doka an ɗauko su daga Kundin Tsarin Mulki na Najeriya da Dokar Zaɓe.
settings.disclaimerText: Wannan app yana ba da bayanai na gaba ɗaya game da farar hula. Don shawara ta doka, tuntuɓi lauya mai cancantar. Don bayanin zaɓe na hukuma, ziyarci INEC a inec.gov.ng.

law.constitution: Kundin Tsarin Mulki na Tarayyar Najeriya, 1999

install.prompt: Ƙara CivicNG zuwa allon gida don amfani offline
